description: PRICED TO SELL!! Experience modern living in this beautifully updated 3 bed, 3 bath townhouse in sought-after Clayton! The bright open-concept design features 9’ ceilings, quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a large island perfect for family meals or entertaining friends. Recent upgrades include new flooring, fresh designer paint, an upgraded fridge, and stylish lighting throughout. The spacious primary suite offers a walk-in closet and a spa-inspired ensuite with dual sinks and a glass shower. Enjoy your sunny balcony for morning coffee or relaxing evenings. This well-maintained complex offers resort-style amenities including an outdoor pool, gym, clubhouse and hockey rink. Close to parks, schools, and shopping — the perfect place to call home!
